nodes.name: When Executed by WF-001
nodes.notes: Input data mode = Accept all data (passThrough). n8n source: when inputSource==PASSTHROUGH the trigger returns inputData unchanged, INCLUDING binary. Required so binary from the parent Execute Workflow node reaches this sub-workflow. typeVersion 1.1 (1 is deprecated).

nodes.name: Load PR-001 + LLM Settings

parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT settings FROM configuration.providers WHERE kind='llm') AS settings, system_prompt, user_prompt FROM configuration.prompt_versions WHERE prompt_id='PR-001' ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1;

nodes.notes: Loads prompt body (R-08/§608, never embedded) + llm settings. CRIE Postgres credential.

nodes.name: Build LLM Request
nodes.notes: Inject OCR into prompt; assemble messages.

nodes.name: OpenAI Chat Completions

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json._model, temperature: $json._temp, max_tokens: $json._max, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: $json.messages }) }}

nodes.notes: Credentialed OpenAI call. Swap provider by editing this node only (§360).

nodes.name: Shape Result
nodes.notes: -> { knowledge } contract (ids assigned downstream in WF-001).

meta.note: LLM via HTTP Request node; prompt loaded from configuration.prompt_versions (never embedded).
meta.enrichment: output = {...incomingItem, newResult}; never discards accumulated state
meta.jsonbFix: settings is jsonb (object); removed JSON.parse on settings; LLM-content parse retained
meta.triggerFix: executeWorkflowTrigger upgraded to 1.1 inputSource=passThrough for binary passthrough
changelog: v1.4.1: Fixed stale copy-paste reference. 'Build LLM Request' referenced $('Load PR-002 + LLM Settings') — a node that does not exist in SW-008 (its node is 'Load PR-001 + LLM Settings'). Would have thrown "hasn't been executed" at runtime. Reference retargeted; stale PR-002 comment corrected. No logic change.
